summary: Implemented server-derived task-scoped sync risk evaluation in os_gate. Exact requested paths are resolved against the server scope ledger and revalidated for current hashes, Git blobs, approvals, and classifier state; unrelated backlog is observed out of scope. Regression proves verified scope allowed and unregistered scope blocked. Committed and pushed as 5cc8532951181dd18c796cd01b134009bbb0cf49.
decisions: Use caller paths only as a request, then derive authority from the server-owned task scope ledger.
Keep whole-repository observation as the default when no exact task allowlist is supplied.
next_steps: Publish this task evidence through real receipted auto_sync.
Verify fresh-clone public safety and continue direct-client equivalence evidence.
